title: ophrys mammosa subsp. gortynia
intro: Ophrys mammosa subsp. gortynia, also known as the Man Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys mammosa subsp. gortynia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
